previousMessages.message: Hello! We're in the wonderful St. Bernard Parish, Louisiana. I'm your friendly guide here, and we're on a mission to flood-proof our beautiful town. We've got a big job ahead of us, but I know we can do it together! Would you like me to tell you about the history of flooding in our parish?
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: We're in St. Bernard Parish, Louisiana! A beautiful place with a lot of heart, but we've had our fair share of big floods over the years. High river levels and storms like Hurricane Katrina have taught us the importance of flood-proofing our homes and our town. Let's get started on helping our community stay safe! To start a game, just head over to the lobby and right-click one of the spruce buttons!
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: A flood is when too much water comes into our town and covers the streets, homes, and buildings. It can be really scary, but we're working hard to make sure our town is safe and prepared for any water that might come our way! We're going to learn all about how to flood-proof our homes and community, and I'm so glad you're here to help!
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: Hey there! Welcome back! Let's get back to flood-proofing our town. We're on a roll! To start a new level, just head over to the lobby and right-click one of the spruce buttons. Ready to try another challenge?
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: Whoa, look at that awesome wand! That's so cool! But let's save the wand for another day, okay? Today, we've got some serious flood-proofing to do! Would you like to start the Easy Sandbags level and help me collect sandbags for our town's storm protection system?

previousMessages.message: what happened in saint bernard parish
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: Would you like me to tell you about the history of flooding in St. Bernard Parish? We've had some big floods over the years, like the ones caused by high river levels and storms like Hurricane Katrina. It's an important story to learn from so we can be better prepared for the future!
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: Let me tell you about it. St. Bernard Parish has a long history of flooding, going back to the early days of our town. The Mississippi River, which forms part of our parish boundary, can get really high during heavy rains or storms, and when it does, water can pour into our streets and homes. Hurricane Katrina in 2005 was one of the biggest floods our parish has ever seen. But we learned a lot from that experience and are working hard to protect our homes and community from floodwaters. We're going to learn all about the solutions that can help us, from sandbags to spillways!
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: Hello! Now that you know a bit about our town's history with flooding, are you ready to start the Easy Sandbags level and help me collect some sandbags to help protect our homes? Remember, to start, just head to the level's entrance and right-click the spruce start button!
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: We've got a whole range of levels to help us flood-proof our town. There's the Easy Flood Barriers level, where you'll help me build barriers to keep the water out. Then there's the Medium Drainage Systems level, where we'll learn about creative ways to move water away from our homes. And finally, there's the Hard Spillways level, where we'll work on building a spillway to divert excess water away from our town. Which one sounds like a challenge you'd like to take on?
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: We've got a few more levels to explore. There's the Wildlife Rescue level, where we'll rescue stranded animals from the floodwaters. And then there's the Storm Drains level, where we'll clear debris and plant blockages from the street storm drains to help water flow away. Last but not least, there's the Save the Furniture level, where we'll rush into a house to secure items on tables and countertops before it floods. Each level gets a little harder, but I know you're up for the challenge!
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: Let me give you the complete list! We've got:  1. Easy Sandbags: Help me collect sandbags to protect our homes from rising waters. 2. Easy Flood Barriers: Build barriers to keep the water out and keep our town safe. 3. Medium Drainage Systems: Learn about creative ways to move water away from our homes. 4. Medium Wildlife Rescue: Rescue stranded animals from the floodwaters. 5. Medium Storm Drains: Clear debris and plant blockages from the street storm drains. 6. Hard Spillways: Work on building a spillway to divert excess water away from our town. 7. Hard Save the Furniture: Rush into a house to secure items on tables and countertops before it floods. 8. Expert Flood Control: Help me activate floodgates and redirect the water flow to protect our town.  Each level gets a little harder, but I know you're up for the challenge! Are you ready to start a level and help me flood-proof our town?
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: Hello! Remember, to start a level, just head to the level's entrance and right-click the spruce start button. Would you like to start the Easy Sandbags level again, or maybe try a new level like the Wildlife Rescue level?
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: hello. i am a new player. where are we and what are we doing?
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: Welcome to the game, friend! We're in beautiful St. Bernard Parish, Louisiana, and we're on a mission to flood-proof our town! I'm your friendly guide, and I'll help you through this exciting adventure. We're going to learn all about how to protect our homes and community from floodwaters. We've got a fun 5-level challenge ahead of us, and I'm excited to have you join me! Are you ready to get started?
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: Let's get started! First, I'll give you a quick overview of our mission. We need to help our town prepare for floods by completing 5 levels of flood-proofing. Each level will teach you a new skill to help protect our homes and community.  To start, let's go to the first level, which is the Easy Sandbags level. To get there, let's head to the lobby and right-click the spruce start button.  Let's go! <LEAD>
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: WOW, congratulations, friend! You've completed all 5 levels of flood-proofing! I'm so proud of you! You've learned so much about how to protect our town from floods, and I know you've had a blast doing it.  Let's review what you've accomplished:  1. You helped me collect sandbags to protect our homes from rising waters in the Easy Sandbags level. 2. You built barriers to keep the water out and kept our town safe in the Easy Flood Barriers level. 3. You helped me clear debris and plant blockages from the street storm drains in the Storm Drains level. 4. You rescued stranded animals from the floodwaters in the Wildlife Rescue level. 5. You helped me secure items on tables and countertops before it flooded in the Save the Furniture level.  I'm so thrilled that you've completed all 5 levels! You're a superstar flood-proofer! Would you like to play another level or try something new?
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: I'm going to hang out in St. Bernard Parish for a bit longer, helping out with any other flood-proofing tasks that come up. But I'll always be here to help you and our community stay safe and prepared for any floods that might come our way!
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: You know, as a friendly guide in St. Bernard Parish, I have a special connection to the waters that shape our community. I like to think of the water as a reminder of the importance of flood-proofing and the need to be prepared for any waters that might come our way. But I don't have to like the water personally, I just help folks like you learn about it! Would you like to learn more about our town's waterways?
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

- Short Greeting: Well, well, well, look who decided to waste their time on St. Bernard Parish, Louisiana. I'm Guide, your reluctant guide through this utterly useless educational game. Our aim: to flood-proof this pitiful town. Or, at least, make a fortune off of all the disaster caused by rising waters. Shall we begin, or do you need a lesson on the basics of being a pawn to my genius?
